name: Banana Boats for Camping
recipeInstructions:
1. This recipe serves 1; make as many as desired.
2. Slice each banana lengthwise but not all the way through. Leave the skin on (do not peel).
3. Place 1-2 teaspoons of marshmallows and chocolate chips in each slit.
4. Sprinkle lightly with brown sugar.
5. Wrap tightly in foil, sealing the ends securely.
6. Place on grill over campfire or coals, seam side up.
7. Cook for about 7 minutes.
